tasks.instruction: Przeczytaj tekst. Uzupelnij kazda luke (1.1-1.8) jednym wyrazem, przeksztalcajac wyrazy podane w ramce tak, aby otrzymac logiczny i gramatycznie poprawny tekst. Dwa wyrazy zostaly podane dodatkowo i nie pasuja do zadnej luki.
tasks.title: THE WORLD OF MUSIC AND ART
tasks.text: Art and music give people a wonderful way to express their feelings. A live 1.1. ________ by a great orchestra can be an unforgettable experience. Many 1.2. ________ start learning to play instruments at a very young age. With years of 1.3. ________ and practice, they develop incredible skills. Painting and drawing require a lot of 1.4. ________ because artists must create something from nothing. The 1.5. ________ of emotions through art can be very 1.6. ________ for both the artist and the audience. Visiting a gallery full of 1.7. ________ paintings is always a great 1.8. ________. Art and music truly make our lives richer and more meaningful.
